THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TH_PATCHOULI-PATCHOUL: [jitter]... *cough* ...[/jitter] This tower sure is tall, but I've finally reached the top...
For someone of your physique, that's impressive perseverance. But it's meaningless...
You made me climb all those stairs, [jitter][red]now prepare to die![/red][/jitter]
I deeply apologize, but I have no time for guests right now. Please leave.
A human skilled in elemental magic? This tower is getting livelier...
Let me correct you: I am not human, but a magician.
... Does that matter? In any case, this is no place for you. Go back!
